title: PlusAI Intern-Technical Program Management Interview Questions & Practice

content:
# PlusAI Intern-Technical Program Management Interview Preparation

Prepare for your PlusAI Intern-Technical Program Management internship interview with comprehensive practice questions and AI-powered feedback.

**Location:** Santa Clara, CA
**Application Status:** Currently Closed

## Interview Practice Features

- Real interview questions from PlusAI
- AI-powered feedback and scoring
- Technical and behavioral question practice
- Company-specific preparation tips
- Industry insights and trends

## About This Opportunity

PlusAI is offering a Intern-Technical Program Management internship position in Santa Clara, CA. This is an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on experience in software engineering.




## Interview Preparation Tips

1. Research PlusAI's products and mission
2. Practice coding problems and system design
3. Prepare behavioral examples using the STAR method
4. Review your resume and be ready to discuss projects
5. Prepare thoughtful questions about the role and company

## Start Your Interview Practice

Use our AI-powered interview practice tool to prepare for your PlusAI interview and increase your chances of success.
